author: Koray Tugberk Gubur
title: How to get topical authority in 2026 with Koray Tuğberk
content: LinkedIn article from January 2026 discussing topical authority strategies for 2026. Koray Tugberk GUBUR explains how to achieve topical authority in the current SEO landscape. The article likely covers the six pillars of success including 'Topical Map First' - building a complete entity map of the niche before writing content. Features a case study showing significant growth: turning 81 clicks/month into 3,910 clicks (a +4,728% increase) between January and April 2026.
